title: Format ConfigLoadError for people
scenario: Typed errors are for programs; Display provides stable human-readable messages at the boundary.
instructions: Implement Display for ConfigLoadError with one concise message per variant.

hints.body: Keep the Hierarchical configuration loader errors code active and implement Display for ConfigLoadError with one concise message per variant.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Format ConfigLoadError for people is shown below.

completionExplanation: Format ConfigLoadError for people now extends the active Hierarchical configuration loader errors code with config err display. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
